The IG is not for the international realm, and it uses SNOMED CT, so it should fix the SCT edition in the expansion parameters

fr-core-1: The left side is inherently a collection, and so the expression 'extension.where(url = 'https://hl7.fr/ig/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/fr-core-identity-reliability').extension.where(url = 'identityStatus').value.code = 'VALI'' may fail or return false if there is more than one item in the content being evaluated
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this extension

Unknown System 'https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2445' specified, so Concepts and Filters can't be checked (Details: A definition for CodeSystem 'https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2445' could not be found, so the code cannot be validated)
Error from http://tx.fhir.org/r4: Unable to provide support for code system https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2445

The system 'https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/JDV_J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS/FHIR/JDV-J79-CiviliteExercice-RASS' is actually a value set, which itself refers to the system 'https://mos.esante.gouv.fr/NOS/TRE_R11-CiviliteExercice/FHIR/TRE-R11-CiviliteExercice' so that may be what is intended here

The system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActEncounterCode' is actually a value set, which itself refers to the system 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-ActCode' so that may be what is intended here
Error from http://tx.fhir.org/r4: Unable to provide support for code system http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActEncounterCode

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/discharge-disposition'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer. Using version '1.0.1', found versions: 1.0.1, 4.0.1
